CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kathryn A. Martin, Esq., appearing for Defendant California Pacific Medical Center. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by the Plaintiff, nor an objection filed and no objection by appearing counsel. The court orders Defendants Does 1-35 dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT WONG, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained for uncertainty with 10 days leave to amend to segregate premises liability and professional negligence causes of action. Plaintiff must comply with CRC 2.112. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
